description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ruby:2.6.9 Docker image with a mysql:8.0 service, caching the vendor/cache directory. Define variables GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY=recursive, MYSQL_DATABASE=mirrOS_api_test, MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD=glancr and stages test and bundle. Add a before_script that runs ruby -v and gem update bundler for all jobs. In the test stage add a rails job that executes bundle install -j $(nproc) --path vendor/bundle, sets RAILS_ENV=test and RAILS_DATABASE_HOST=mysql, then runs bin/rails db:setup. The pipeline has no artifacts or special rules.
